name: Katex.Lang

values.name: human
values.comment: Like `Katex.Simple.human`, but instead of feeding it a string, you must feed it a `lang`uage-dependent string.

name: Katex.Complex

values.name: compile
values.comment: Like `Katex.Simple.compile`, but depends on the `config`uration and `lang`uage.
values.type: config -> lang -> Latex config lang -> String

values.name: view
values.comment: Like `Katex.Simple.view`, but depends on the `config`uration and `lang`uage.
values.type: config -> lang -> Passage config lang -> Html a

name: Katex.Simple

values.name: compile
values.comment: For other scenarios, LaTeX instance can be `compile`d to a string.

values.name: display
values.comment: Use `display` when writing LaTeX code for display math environment.

values.name: inline
values.comment: Use `inline` when writing LaTeX code for inline math environment.

values.name: view
values.comment: Processes a LaTeX passage (list of LaTeX instances) into a text node (parsable by the KaTeX library).

name: Katex.Config

values.name: display
values.comment: Like `Katex.Simple.display`, but instead of feeding it a string, you must feed it a `config`uration-dependent string.

values.name: inline
values.comment: Like `Katex.Simple.inline`, but instead of feeding it a string, you must feed it a `config`uration-dependent string.
